title: Q1 2026 Data Retention Policy
body:
1. POLICY OVERVIEW

This Q1 2026 Data Retention Policy establishes TechCorp's standards for the retention, storage, and disposal of all data categories collected, processed, and maintained by the company across operational, customer-facing, and internal systems. This policy aligns with evolving regulatory requirements including GDPR, state privacy laws, and emerging data protection frameworks.

All data shall be retained only as long as necessary to fulfill its original collection purpose or as required by applicable law. Upon expiration of the retention period, data must be securely deleted, anonymized, or archived in compliance with this policy and applicable legal obligations.

2. RETENTION PERIOD STANDARDS

Customer Personal Data: Customer personal data collected for service delivery shall be retained for the duration of the customer relationship plus 12 months following account closure, unless law requires longer retention. This includes contact information, usage logs, and account history.

Transaction Records: Financial and transaction records shall be retained for a minimum of 7 years to comply with tax and financial reporting obligations, or as otherwise required by applicable regulations.

Anonymized Analytics Data: Anonymized analytics data collected for product improvement, usage analytics, and aggregated reporting shall be retained for 18 months from the date of collection. Following this period, all anonymized analytics data must be securely deleted or further aggregated to prevent any possibility of re-identification. This retention period aligns with updated regulatory guidance requiring proportionate retention of non-personal analytics data while balancing business intelligence and privacy protection needs.

System Logs and Security Data: System access logs, security event logs, and audit trails shall be retained for 24 months to support incident investigation, compliance audits, and regulatory inquiries. Following this period, logs may be archived
